title: lappula glabrata
intro: Lappula glabrata, also known as the smooth blue thistle or glabrous lappula, is a perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lappula glabrata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lappula glabrata typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
